inputs.benchmark_note: Statistical baseline is the five-seed 20-vehicle non-LLM average.

validation.goal: Compare generated sampled-route distances against random real dates in the selected period.
validation.fleet_scope: Only sampled/generated vehicle-days are counted; non-sampled trucks are excluded rather than assigned generated distance 0.
